modules.name: db.celery
documentation: SatNOGS DB celery task workers
pylint: disable=C0415

functions.name: db.celery.update_tle_sets
documentation: Wrapper task for 'update_tle_sets' shared task
Wrapper tasks as workaround for registering shared tasks to beat scheduler
See https://github.com/celery/celery/issues/5059

documentation: Wrapper task for 'background_cache_statistics' shared task

documentation: Wrapper task for 'decocde_recent_data' shared task

documentation: Wrapper task for 'decocde_recent_data' shared task

functions.name: db.celery.setup_periodic_tasks

modules.name: db.base.helpers
documentation: Helper functions for SatNOGS DB

functions.name: db.base.helpers.gridsquare
documentation:
Calculates a maidenhead grid square from a lat/long

Used when we get a SiDS submission, we want to store and display the
location of the submitter as a grid square.

:returns: a string of the grid square, ie: EM69uf

functions.name: db.base.helpers.get_api_token
documentation:
If necessary, create, then return an API Token for a user

```
param user

a SatNOGS DB User object

returns

user API token
```

modules.name: db.base.utils
documentation: Miscellaneous functions for SatNOGS DB

functions.name: db.base.utils.remove_latest_tle_set
documentation: Remove LatestTleSet entry for specific Satellite

functions.name: db.base.utils.update_latest_tle_sets
documentation: Update LatestTleSet entries for all or specific Satellites

functions.name: db.base.utils.get_tle_sources
documentation: Check for and return TLE custom sources

functions.name: db.base.utils.calculate_statistics
documentation:
Calculates statistics about the data we have in DB

:returns: a dictionary of statistics

functions.name: db.base.utils.calculate_transmitters_stats
documentation:
Helper function to provite transmitters and statistics about
transmitters in db (such as total and percentage of alive)

functions.name: db.base.utils.calculate_mode_stats
documentation:
Helper function to provide data and labels for modes associated with
transmitters provided

functions.name: db.base.utils.calculate_band_stats
documentation:
Helper function to provide data and labels for bands associated with
transmitters provided

functions.name: db.base.utils.create_point
documentation:
Create a decoded data point in JSON format that is influxdb compatible

:returns: a JSON formatted time series data point

functions.name: db.base.utils.write_influx
documentation: Take a json object and send to influxdb.

functions.name: db.base.utils.decode_demoddata
documentation: Decode a DemodData object and push it either in InfluxDB instance or in local DB

functions.name: db.base.utils.decode_data
documentation:
Decode data for a satellite, with an option to limit the scope.

```
param sat_id

the Satellite Identifier of the satellite to decode data for

param demoddata_id

if demoddata_id exists, try to decode this demoddata object

param redecode

redecode demoddata or only recent
```

functions.name: db.base.utils.cache_statistics
documentation:
Populate a django cache with statistics from data in DB

:::{seealso}
calculate_statistics
:::
Caches stats about satellites and data

functions.name: db.base.utils.remove_exponent
documentation: Remove exponent.

functions.name: db.base.utils.millify
documentation: Humanize number.

functions.name: db.base.utils.read_influx
documentation:
Queries influxdb for the last 30d of data points (counted) in 1d resolution.

```
param norad

the NORAD ID of the satellite to query influxdb for

returns

a raw json of the measurement, timestamps, and point counts
```

modules.name: db.base.views
documentation: Base django views for SatNOGS DB

functions.name: db.base.views.home
documentation:
View to render home page.

:returns: base/home.html

functions.name: db.base.views.transmitters_list
documentation:
View to render transmitters list page.

:returns: base/transmitters.html

functions.name: db.base.views.launches_list
documentation:
View to render launches list page.

:returns: base/launches.html

functions.name: db.base.views.launch
documentation:
View to render launch page.

:returns: base/launch.html

functions.name: db.base.views.robots
documentation:
robots.txt handler

:returns: robots.txt

functions.name: db.base.views.satellites
documentation:
View to render satellites page.

:returns: base/satellites.html

functions.name: db.base.views.satellite
documentation:
View to render satellite page.

:returns: base/satellite.html

functions.name: db.base.views.request_export
documentation:
View to request frames export download.

This triggers a request to collect and zip up the requested data for
download, which the user is notified of via email when the celery task is
completed.
:returns: the originating satellite page

functions.name: db.base.views.satellite_suggestion_handler
documentation:
Returns the Satellite page after approving or rejecting a suggestion if
user has approve permission.

:returns: Satellite page

functions.name: db.base.views.transmitter_suggestion_handler
documentation:
Returns the Satellite page after approving or rejecting a suggestion if
user has approve permission.

:returns: Satellite page

functions.name: db.base.views.about
documentation:
View to render about page.

:returns: base/about.html

functions.name: db.base.views.satnogs_help
documentation:
View to render help modal. Have to avoid builtin 'help' name

:returns: base/modals/help.html

functions.name: db.base.views.search
documentation:
View to render search page.

:returns: base/search.html

functions.name: db.base.views.stats
documentation:
View to render stats page.

:returns: base/stats.html or base/calc-stats.html

functions.name: db.base.views.statistics
documentation:
Return transmitter cached statistics if the cache exist

:returns: JsonResponse of statistics

functions.name: db.base.views.users_edit
documentation:
View to render user settings page.

:returns: base/users_edit.html

functions.name: db.base.views.recent_decoded_cnt
documentation:
Returns a query of InfluxDB for a count of points across a given measurement
(norad) over the last 30 days, with a timestamp in unixtime.

:returns: JSON of point counts as JsonResponse

methods.name: db.base.admin.SatelliteAdmin.check_celery
documentation:
Returns status of Celery workers

Check the delay for celery workers, return an error if a connection
can not be made or if the delay is too long. Otherwise return that
Celery is OK.

:returns: admin home page redirect with popup message

methods.name: db.base.admin.SatelliteAdmin.decode_all_data
documentation:
Returns the admin home page, while triggering a Celery decode task

Forces a decode of all data for a Satellite Identifier. This could be very resource
intensive but necessary when catching a satellite up with a new decoder

```
param sat_id

the Satellite Identifier for the satellite to decode

returns

Admin home page
```
Defines Satellite view in django admin UI

modules.name: db.api.pagination
documentation: Custom pagination classes for REST framework

classes.name: db.api.pagination.LinkedHeaderPageNumberPagination
documentation:
This overrides the default PageNumberPagination so that it only
returns the results as an array, not the pagination controls
(eg number of results, etc)

classes.name: db.api.pagination.CursorPaginationWithLinkHeader
documentation:
The default cursor pagination by django-rest-framework, but additionally
the next/prev link is provided via the HTTP "Link" header.

The next/prev keys in the response body are kept for backward-compatibility
with existing API clients.

observations

Creates observation artifact from an [HDF5 formatted file][hdf5ref]
* Requires session or key authentication to create an artifact

[hdf5ref]: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hierarchical_Data_Format
Artifacts are file-formatted objects collected from a satellite observation.

modules.name: db.settings
documentation:
SatNOGS DB Application django settings

For local installation settings please copy .env-dist to .env and edit
the appropriate settings in that file. You should not need to edit this
file for local settings!
